title: Molten Obsidian Tools
description: Adds obsidian modifications to diamond tools and Reinforcements to Netherite tools
body:
# Molten Obsidian Tools


Have you ever been **annoyed** by crafting a replacement diamond tool when the one you've *been* using **breaks**?


## ALERT!


I do not recommend downloading the **ALPHA** versions of neither **Forge** nor **Fabric** **1.20.X** as the crafting recipes for the smithing tables weren't ported properly. I will be keeping them up for archiving purposes.


## Overview:


With this mod, you can ***upgrade*** your diamond tool to **increase** the **durability** *and* **damage** depending on the tool. All it takes is a **Smithing Table** and 1 piece of **Molten Obsidian**!



## Crafting:


In order to obtain **Molten Obsidian** you must first find **Obsidian**, then blast the obsidian in a **Blasting Furnace** for **2 minutes** to get **20 xp** and 1 **Molten Obsidian**

## 1.20.X Crafting

You need to craft the **Molten Upgrade Template** or the **Reinforced Upgrade Template** as well as use **Molten Obsidian** or **Reinforced Obsidian** in order to upgrade your Diamond or Netherite tools!!!

* Crafting recipes should be available with **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**
